title: Unused local variables should be removed
description: An unused local variable is a variable that has been declared but is not used anywhere in the block of code where it is defined. It is dead code, contributing to unnecessary complexity and leading to confusion when reading the code. Therefore, it should be removed from your code to maintain clarity and efficiency.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.description: Check for variables declared in 'variables' section but never referenced in the template
